nasb.text: God made the expanse, and separated the waters which were below the expanse from the waters which were above the expanse; and it was so.

esv.text: And God made the expanse and separated the waters that were under the expanse from the waters that were above the expanse. And it was so.

cnv.text: 神造了穹蒼，把穹蒼以下的水和穹蒼以上的水分開了。

ccb.text: 果然如此。上帝开辟了穹苍，用穹苍将水上下分开。

csbs.text: 神就造了穹苍，把穹苍以下的水和穹苍以上的水分开。事情就如此成就了。
